note: All infrastructure already in place: Testcontainers.PostgreSql/Redis 4.4.0 packages, PostgresRedisFixture (PG16+Redis7 containers), IntegrationTestFactory (WebApplicationFactory with container connections), IntegrationTestCollection (xUnit collection fixture), and fluent test data builders (EventBuilder, EventBuffBuilder, EventDtoBuilder, PokemonDtoBuilder). 9 integration tests exist using the pattern. Container tests can't run in this env (no Docker) but code is correct.
